description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is finished in a smooth, gray concrete texture, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent staircase leading up to a recessed entryway, flanked by two sets of windows. On one side, there is a spacious rooftop terrace enclosed by a glass or metal railing, accessible from the upper floor. The rear of the house showcases floor-to-ceiling windows that open onto the terrace, emphasizing indoor-outdoor connectivity. The overall structure is boxy and monolithic, with subtle variations in volume and surface treatment.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, gray concrete exterior, large windows, and a rooftop terrace. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a prominent front staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, recessed doorway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the rooftop terrace with railing and large sliding glass doors.
description_view_2: Back view with double doors at ground level and a clear view of the window layout.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the flat roof and overall rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a straight staircase, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
